scope: Finish the Gemini OpenAI-compatible provider surface for API-key auth, base URL normalization, tool calls, and streaming

rows.source: Gemini provider profile and OpenAI-compatible shim anchors
requiredBehaviors: normalize Gemini base URLs that already include /openai before appending the provider base path
use GEMINI_API_KEY as the factory and provider API-key label
send Authorization bearer authentication for the Gemini OpenAI-compatible endpoint
omit body.store because Gemini rejects unsupported store fields

rows.source: OpenAI-compatible tool serialization and Gemini shim anchors
requiredBehaviors: serialize request-scoped tools into chat-completions tool definitions
parse Gemini OpenAI-compatible non-stream tool_calls into LLMToolCall entries
return finishReason tool_calls when Gemini requests tool execution
reject malformed Gemini tool-call arguments instead of silently dropping executable calls
edgeCases: tool arguments arrive as JSON strings
assistant content is empty when a tool call is emitted
tool catalog supplied per request instead of only at provider construction
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/providers/gemini/provider.test.ts src/llm/provider-parity.test.ts src/llm/wire/chat-completions.test.ts

rows.source: OpenAI-compatible SSE streaming, Gemini shim anchors, and Google OpenAI compatibility docs for stream_options.include_usage
requiredBehaviors: stream Gemini chat-completions content deltas through StreamProgressCallback
send stream_options.include_usage for streamed usage accounting
accumulate streamed tool_calls fragments into completed LLMToolCall entries
include final usage tokens on the resolved streaming LLMResponse
preserve Gemini bearer authentication for streaming requests
edgeCases: content and tool-call fragments interleaved in the same stream
usage appears on the final finish frame

rows.source: Gemini provider profile, validation, and AgenC provider factory anchors
requiredBehaviors: createProvider('gemini') constructs the Gemini provider with configured model and base URL
require GEMINI_API_KEY when no explicit API key is provided
preserve Gemini identity, model metadata, chat, streaming, and health-check methods in canonical provider parity
normalize Gemini responses through the same canonical tool-call behavior as other OpenAI-compatible providers
